name: f1-api-testing
description: F1 API automated tests using Postman e Newman

scripts.test:dev: newman run collections/f1api.postman_collection_Douglas.json -e environments/f1api.environment.json && newman run collections/f1api.postman_collection_Henrique.json -e environments/f1api.environment.json && newman run collections/f1api.postman_collection_Otavio_Augusto.json -e environments/f1api.environment.json && newman run collections/f1api.postman_collection_Otavio_Jimenez.json -e environments/f1api.environment.json
